2
203
GENERAL NOTICE
NOTICE 2856 OF 2009
DEPARTMENT OF ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
GAUTENG LIQUOR ACT, 2003 (ACT NO.2 OF 2003)
EXTENSION NOTICE FOR THE CONVERSION PERIOD OF LICENCES
ISSUED IN TERMS OF THE LIQUOR ACT, 1989 TO A LICENSE UNDER
THE GAUTENG LIQUOR ACT, 2003
I,
FIROZ
CACHALIA,
member of the
Executive
Council
responsible for
economic development in the province hereby in terms of Section 143(2) of
the Gauteng Liquor Act, 2003 (Act NO.2 of 2003) hereby gives notice that
the period within which the holder of a license issued in terms of the Liquor
Act, 1989 (Act No. 27 of 1989) has to submit an application to the Board for
conversion of such license into a license under the Gauteng Liquor Act, 2003
is extended to 01 March 2010.
FIROZ CACHALIA
MEC: ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
